column8: Concrete with cobbles and gravels of sub-angular to sub-rounded rock with occasionally some steel fragment. (FILL)
Sub-rounded cobbles and gravels of moderately decomposed granite and sandstone in brown, silty SAND. (ALLUVIUM)

Moderately strong to strong, brownish pink mottled black and white, moderately to slightly decomposed medium to coarse grained GRANITE with medium to close joint spacing, with natural orange brown, very narrow, extremely narrow, rough planar, stained joints, dipping 70 degrees to 90 degrees, 30 degrees to 45 degrees, and occasionally vertical joints.
Similar, but dark brown, grey to brownish pink mottled black and white, highly to moderately decomposed medium to coarse grained GRANITE. (Note: 23.40m-23.80m: No recovery.)
